CustomField.description: Lookup to Contact. Drives Opportunity Contact Role creation and soft credit attribution. For individual Donations, NPPatch attributes the hard credit to this Contact. For organizational Donations, a soft credit is created instead.
CustomField.inlineHelpText: The main Contact associated with this Donation. For individual gifts, this person receives the hard credit. For organizational gifts, this person receives a soft credit.
CustomField.label: Primary Contact
